fields.label: App ID
fields.description: McDonald's China merchant application ID from the Open Platform at https://open.mcd.cn.

fields.label: Merchant ID
fields.description: McDonald's China merchant ID from the Open Platform at https://open.mcd.cn.

fields.label: Signing Key
fields.description: Signing key paired with the AppId and MerchantId from the Open Platform at https://open.mcd.cn. It is used to generate the Sign header.

fields.label: Environment
fields.description: McDonald's China API environment. Use prod for https://api.open.mcd.cn or uat for https://api-uat.open.mcdchina.net. Defaults to prod.

actions.name: get_cities
actions.description: Get McDonald's China cities that support restaurant and menu lookup.

getCurrent.description: McDonald's China flag value: 0 for no, 1 for yes.

actions.name: get_menu
actions.description: Get a McDonald's China store menu for an order type, daypart, and sales channel.

beCode.description: A McDonald's China query parameter value.

date.description: Date in yyyyMMdd format. When omitted, McDonald's China defaults to the current day.

time.description: Time in HH:mm format. When omitted, McDonald's China defaults to the current time.

isGroupMeal.description: Group meal flag: 0 for no, 1 for yes.

categoryCodeList.description: Category codes that include this product.

groupList.description: Products in this group or combo.
